question: {"requirementId":"26","submittedBy":"Dhruba","environment":"SQA","requirementTitle":"Validate patient registration workflow","requirementDescription":"User should be able to register a patient, validate mandatory demographic fields, detect duplicate patient records, and save patient details successfully.","acceptanceCriteria":"System should validate mandatory fields, show proper error messages, detect duplicates using First Name + Last Name + DOB, allow Continue Anyway when duplicate is found, save patient details, and complete response within expected time.","riskLevel":"High","testingScope":["Functional","Regression","Integration","UI"],"suggestedTestFocus":["Mandatory field validation","Duplicate patient check","Continue Anyway path","Save workflow","Error message validation"]}
